focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 8 A MODEST MILL - LATER THAT DAY 8
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Zus and Asael discover motionless bodies, dead livestock, and a grim scene of death with flies buzzing around, evoking horror and loss.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Son discovering his father's body at the mill
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Asael reacts with horror and grief upon seeing his father's body and the scene of death
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: In mute horror and grief
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Confronting the immediate loss of his parents
evidence_quotes: Zus and Asael stare in mute horror.
ASAEL Papa-- Gottenyu...

relation_updates: Confirms loss of parents
status_updates: Experiences personal tragedy and emotional burden
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Grieving son

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 12 ASAEL AND ARON SLEEP HUDDLED ON THE GROUND 12
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia returns, greeted with fear and relief; Asael clings to him after his parents' death, while Zus cautiously welcomes him with a mezuzah.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Younger brother who lost parents and seeks protection from Tuvia
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Asael clings to Tuvia and reports their parents' death, showing immediate reliance on him
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Clinging to Tuvia and under his protection
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The family's safety and future are uncertain after the parents' death
evidence_quotes: Asael leaps up to embrace him as if he were salvation itself.
Papa and Mama. They killed them.
Asael clings to him.

relation_updates: Asael clings to Tuvia and refers to him as 'Papa', shifting to parent-child dynamic
status_updates: Now under Tuvia's protection
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bond with Tuvia as a protector

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia questions raiding for food; Zus insists on taking it despite risks. Asael asserts their knowledge of the woods. Tuvia, outvoted, concedes as the group prepares to act.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Provides input on food scarcity and supports raiding by emphasizing group's knowledge of the woods
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Asael states that they know the woods well, which helps convince Tuvia to agree to raiding for food
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Secure food by raiding a farm
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Group decides to raid a farm for food after Asael's support
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether the raid can be done without alerting police
evidence_quotes: ASAEL Zus finished the last of the sausage.
ASAEL He has dogs.
ASAEL We know these woods. They'll never find us in here.

relation_updates: Supports Zus's aggressive stance against Tuvia's caution
status_updates: Becomes decisive voice in group survival strategy
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Aware of food status and terrain, as shown by tracking supplies and asserting woods knowledge

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Zus, covered in blood, invites Jacov and Peretz to join the Bielski Otriad in fighting Germans, emphasizing courage and use of weapons to participate in sabotage and combat operations starting immediately.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Group identity definer
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Names the group 'Bielski Otriad' and invites Peretz and Jacov to join.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Formalize the group's name and recruit new members.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: The group is now called the Bielski Otriad, with an invitation extended to Peretz and Jacov.
evidence_quotes: What is an 'otriad?'
Then we are the Bielski Otriad. You want to join?

relation_updates: Invites Peretz and Jacov to join the newly named group
status_updates: Co-founds the Bielski Otriad
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Founding member who names the partisan group.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jacov misses two shots at a fleeing Private, hits him on the third in the leg; the Private limps before Peretz and Asael tackle and kick him until Jacov arrives and delivers a final shot.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Participant in the violent capture of a fleeing soldier
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Knocks down and kicks a fleeing soldier, assisting in his capture and death
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Directly involved in the lethal violence against the soldier
evidence_quotes: Peretz and Asael can now catch up to the soldier.
FROM FAR AWAY We SEE them knock the Private to the ground,
KICKING him

relation_updates: Acts in coordination with Peretz and Jacov during violent capture
status_updates: Becomes direct participant in killing an enemy soldier
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Willing to use physical violence against enemies

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Policemen attack, killing two; Tuvia directs escape, Asael leads group, Kisely finds trail. Gunfire destroys shelter, chaos ensues as they flee deeper into woods.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Evacuation leader during police attack
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Clutches Chaya's hand and urges group forward, following Tuvia's order to keep them moving.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Direct group away from policemen and into the woods
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Actively leading the group along the escape trail into the woods
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether the group will escape safely from the policemen
evidence_quotes: Asael clutches Chaya's hand, rounding up others, urging them forward.
ASAEL Don't panic. THIS WAY! GO.

relation_updates: Asael physically clutches Chaya's hand during escape
Tuvia explicitly trusts Asael to lead evacuation
status_updates: Assumes active leadership role in crisis
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Protective and directive leader in crisis

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia and Zus's violent clash escalates, leading Zus to leave with others to join real partisans, deepening the rift between the brothers and leaving Asael torn between them.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Loyal brother and mediator
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Asael refuses Zus's invitation to leave with him, choosing to stay with Tuvia.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Stays with Tuvia's group after Zus departs.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Estrangement from Zus and ongoing family tension.
evidence_quotes: Are you coming?
No.
Good. I'll dance at your wedding.

relation_updates: Strengthens bond with Tuvia by choosing to stay
Estranges from Zus by not joining him
status_updates: Committed to Tuvia's leadership after Zus's departure
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Loyalty to Tuvia.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Asael and Chaya marry in light snow; he consecrates her with a rifle instead of a ring during the vow exchange led by Shimon.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Groom in a wedding ceremony
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marries Chaya by giving her a shiny new rifle instead of a ring during the vow exchange led by Shimon.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Married to Chaya
evidence_quotes: they say repeat their vows
ASAEL Behold thou art consecrated unto me by this ring according to the Laws of Moses and Israel.
But rather than a ring, Asael gives her a shiny new rifle.

relation_updates: Asael and Chaya become husband and wife
status_updates: Marital status changes to married

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia asserts authority after Arkady's challenge, silences dissent, and confronts accusations of corruption and drunkenness; Asael reveals rumors undermining Tuvia's leadership, leaving him shaken.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Younger brother and camp distributor
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Asael is punished with reduced rations by Tuvia alongside Arkady, reveals camp rumors about Tuvia's corruption and drinking, and his idealized view of Tuvia is broken.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Asael's idealized view of Tuvia is shattered, leaving him disillusioned with Tuvia's leadership.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The rumors and dissent in the camp, Tuvia's drinking, and the conflict with Arkady.
evidence_quotes: Arkady Lubczani has pulled a knife on Asael, who backs away, STUMBLING into a group of bystanders.
TUVIA Reduced rations for one week. (a beat) Both of you.
ASAEL ...that you drink too much and are no longer fit to lead us.
Asael looks at him. No longer the brother he once idealized.

relation_updates: Asael's idealized view of Tuvia is broken
status_updates: Punished with reduced rations
Seen as a target by Arkady
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Critical of Tuvia's leadership flaws after being punished and witnessing his drunkenness.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 150 IN REAL TIME -- THE CAMP IS BEING TORN APART 150
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Asael and Tuvia crawl to safety after an explosion; Asael organizes defense with others while Tuvia, still disoriented, realizes the bombing has stopped.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Defensive coordinator
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Asael takes command after the explosion, directing Malbin to evacuate bunkers and organizing defensive positions while Tuvia is disoriented.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Hold off German troops until the remaining people are safe.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Asael has assigned specific defensive positions to group members and assumed his own post.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether the assigned defensive positions will hold against the Germans.
evidence_quotes: Asael appears out of the smoke, yells at Malbin above the din. ASAEL Get them out of the bunkers!
ASAEL (CONT'D) We need to hold them off...until the rest are safe.
ASAEL With Levine and Miriam... There. (points out positions) Lazar, Rosa, and Schmuel. There and there. (Tuvia nods) And me.
Asael pantomimes firing a rifle.

relation_updates: Tuvia defers to Asael's tactical leadership
status_updates: Assumes battlefield command role
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Shows initiative and leadership in combat by organizing defenses under fire.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 162 A RISE REVEALS THE IMMENSITY OF THE KRASNAYA GORKA SWAMP 162
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: One by one, men remove their belts and offer them to Asael, creating a quiet, heroic moment that moves Tuvia deeply as the group unites for the crossing.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Returning leader
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Asael returns, insists the group keep moving, and proposes forming a human chain with belts to cross the swamp.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Lead the group across the swamp using the human chain.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: The group begins offering belts to form the chain, uniting for the crossing.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Getting everyone across the swamp safely.
evidence_quotes: Suddenly a VOICE interrupts. VOICE Why are we stopping? Everyone turns. It's Asael.
ASAEL Nothing is impossible! What we have done is impossible!
ASAEL We'll link arms. Make a chain. A human chain.

relation_updates: Tuvia sees him as a man and regains voice
Group offers belts in support
status_updates: Back with the group
Assumed leadership role
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Leader who organizes the group for the swamp crossing.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 176 THE OPENING SCENE - NEW YORK CITY - 1982 176
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: An elderly man, moved by gratitude, calls Tuvia Bielski an angel after a cab ride; Tuvia, a humble hero who saved many, lived unrecognized in New York until his death in 1987.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Fate revealed via on-screen text in epilogue
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Joined the Russian Army and died six months later
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Deceased
evidence_quotes: ASAEL JOINED THE RUSSIAN ARMY AND DIED SIX MONTHS LATER.

status_updates: Joined Russian Army
Died six months after joining

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Asael begins as a grieving younger brother after discovering his family's death, finding protection with Tuvia. He becomes a practical and decisive voice in the Bielski Otriad, participating in violence, leading evacuations, and marrying Chaya. His loyalty is tested through disillusionment with Tuvia's leadership, but he rises to tactical command in combat. Post-war, he joins the Russian Army and dies six months later.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia dresses as his wife Rifka, standing by the window, discusses danger, false papers, and leaving; she refuses to join him in the country.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: husband leaving wife for family
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Tuvia decides to leave Rifka and go to his family in the country after she refuses to accompany him.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To go to his family in the country.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Tuvia leaves the apartment to head to the countryside.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Rifka's safety with false papers and the status of their marriage.
evidence_quotes: TUVIA I need to see to my family. Will you come?
RIFKA To the country? No.
Tuvia shakes his head, no.

relation_updates: Tuvia and Rifka separate.
Tuvia prioritizes his family over his marriage.
status_updates: Tuvia is now separated from his wife and heading to the countryside.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 12 ASAEL AND ARON SLEEP HUDDLED ON THE GROUND 12
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia returns, greeted with fear and relief; Asael clings to him after his parents' death, while Zus cautiously welcomes him with a mezuzah.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Older brother returning to protect his siblings
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Tuvia reunites with Asael and Aron, learns their parents were killed, and physically comforts them, establishing his protective role.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To protect his brothers
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Tuvia is with his brothers in the forest, holding them, and has been acknowledged by Zus.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Ensuring their survival in the forest
evidence_quotes: Asael leaps up to embrace him as if he were salvation itself.
Papa and Mama. They killed them.
Tuvia hold them silently.
ZUS Big brother returns.

relation_updates: Tuvia becomes the de facto leader and protector of his younger brothers.
Relationship with Zus is wary but accepting.
status_updates: Tuvia is now with his brothers in the forest.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Silent and protective older brother

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Zus and Tuvia argue over their approach to fighting anti-Semites in Belorussia, with Zus advocating violence and Tuvia questioning the strategy.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: questions Zus's plan for violent retaliation
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Tuvia challenges Zus's strategy to terrorize and kill anti-Semites in Belorussia.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: The brothers are in argument with no agreement on strategy.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How they will coordinate their approaches to fighting anti-Semites.
evidence_quotes: TUVIA This is your plan? To terrorize every anti-Semite in Belorussia?
TUVIA He was willing to help us.

relation_updates: Tuvia and Zus argue over future strategy
Tuvia challenges Zus's violent approach
status_updates: Tuvia positions himself as more cautious than Zus
auxiliary.persona_anchor: advocates for caution against violent methods

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia's group encounters survivors led by Avram Rubinski; his injured daughter is barely alive. Tuvia agrees to seek food and a pistol from Koscik despite concerns over resources.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: protector and provider for survivors
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Tuvia offers food to survivors and decides to ask Koscik for more food and a pistol.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Seek food and a pistol from Koscik.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Tuvia leaves to ask Koscik for supplies.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Koscik will provide food and a pistol, and if the survivors can be fed.
evidence_quotes: TUVIA Set her down.
Tuvia offers chunks of bread and cheese.
TUVIA I'll go ask Koscik for food.
ZUS And the pistol. TUVIA And the pistol.

relation_updates: Tuvia establishes a protective relationship with the survivors
Tuvia and Zus disagree on resource allocation
status_updates: Tuvia becomes a leader to a larger group

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia confronts a police captain over his family's murder, forces him to kneel, and kills him and his sons after the captain pleads for mercy and one son attacks.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Avenger
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Tuvia confronts the police captain at his home, forces him to kneel, and shoots him and his two sons after one son attacks.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Tuvia has killed the police captain and his two sons; the wife is left alive and screaming.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The wife is alive and may identify Tuvia.
evidence_quotes: Tuvia stands on the threshold, dripping wet, a spectral figure. He holds the pistol at his side.
TUVIA You know who I am?
One of the man's SONS makes a move toward Tuvia. Tuvia SHOOTS him in the chest.

relation_updates: Tuvia becomes the killer of the police captain and his sons
status_updates: Tuvia has now committed murder as an act of revenge
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Tuvia acts as a direct avenger, using violence to retaliate for his family's deaths.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia asserts leadership, emphasizing survival, unity, and humanity over revenge, as the group commits to ethical resistance and mutual support amid hardship.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Undisputed leader of the group
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Tuvia speaks amid group dissent to prioritize survival over revenge, outlines practical steps for security and ethical conduct, and is accepted as leader.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To improve security, food gathering, and maintain humanity while avoiding revenge.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: The group stops arguing and nods in acknowledgement; Zus lowers his head, indicating Tuvia's leadership is accepted.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Hunger, Nazi threats, and internal disagreements persist.
evidence_quotes: TUVIA I know we have no food. But tomorrow... tomorrow will be another mission.
At this he looks directly at Zus. Daring him to object.
Each day of freedom is an act of faith.

relation_updates: solidifies leadership over group
challenges Zus directly
validates Aron's voice
status_updates: becomes undisputed leader of the group
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A pragmatic leader who values survival and humanity over revenge.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 93 MEANWHILE, THE WOMEN WATCH AS ASAEL LEADS IN NEW ARRIVALS 93
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Chaya pleads with Asael to rescue her parents, offering herself in return; overwhelmed, he agrees. Tuvia reassures Shulman they will help, shaking his hand firmly.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Leader approached by a survivor from the Baranowicze ghetto
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Tuvia responds to Shulman's report about the Baranowicze ghetto liquidation by promising to help and shaking his hand.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To assist in rescuing Jews from the Baranowicze ghetto
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Tuvia has verbally committed to helping with the Baranowicze ghetto situation.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The impending liquidation of the Baranowicze ghetto and the need for a rescue plan.
evidence_quotes: None of us knew if you really existed. I am from Baranowicze. They are going to liquidate the ghetto.
TUVIA We'll do what we can.
Tuvia takes his hand, instead, and shakes it.

relation_updates: gains reverence from Yitzhak Shulman
reaffirms leadership to new arrivals
status_updates: camp becomes a destination for ghetto survivors
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Firm and reassuring leader who commits to action with a handshake.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia and Zus's violent clash escalates, leading Zus to leave with others to join real partisans, deepening the rift between the brothers and leaving Asael torn between them.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Leader who physically clashes with his brother over rescuing ghetto Jews
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Tuvia's insistence on rescuing Jews leads to a fistfight with Zus, ending with Zus leaving with other fighters to join partisans.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To send for and provide for surviving Jews from the ghetto
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Tuvia leads a smaller group after Zus departs, with Asael choosing to stay.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The broken relationship with Zus and loss of fighters from the group
evidence_quotes: TUVIA We must send for whoever is left alive.
TUVIA I won't let that happen.
ASAEL No.

relation_updates: rupture with brother Zus
Zus leaves the group
status_updates: group splits, losing a portion of its fighters

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia declares a Jewish sanctuary in the forest, welcoming refugees despite challenges like forbidden pregnancies and overcrowding, aiming to rebuild lost lives with freedom and community.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Leader declaring sanctuary rules and welcoming refugees
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Tuvia declares rules for the forest sanctuary: women must learn to fight, pregnancies are forbidden due to overcrowding, and refugees are welcomed to rebuild a free Jewish life.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To build and sustain a free Jewish community in the forest
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Tuvia has established himself as the rule-making leader who welcomes refugees into the sanctuary.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Overcrowded bunkers require new construction; the pregnancy ban may cause future tension.
evidence_quotes: TUVIA Women will learn to use weapons and fight alongside men.
This is not a gun. It is Bar Kochba's spear. It is Ehud's sword. You will all learn to protect yourselves.
Pregnancies are forbidden. We cannot accommodate an infant's needs.
This is the one place in all of Belorussia where a Jew can be free.

relation_updates: Malbin shows shared understanding and prior strategy coordination
status_updates: Tuvia establishes himself as the rule-making leader of the sanctuary
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Takes rifle from Asael and holds it aloft, invoking historical Jewish fighters

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 142 THE SPOTTER PLANE -- FLIES OVER THE BIELSKI CAMP 142
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia decides to move the group immediately, referencing Moses' exodus; Malbin doubts the sick and elderly can survive the journey, but Tuvia orders departure.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: camp leader ordering immediate evacuation
timeline_nodes.salient_development: After a spotter plane flies over, Tuvia orders immediate evacuation of the camp, referencing Moses' Exodus, despite Malbin's objections about the sick and elderly.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: evacuate to avoid detection
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: evacuation ordered and word being spread
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether the sick and elderly can survive the evacuation journey
evidence_quotes: Tuvia stares up at it.
TUVIA Moses. The Exodus.
MALBIN You want to move them all? The old, the sick. They'll never make it.
TUVIA We leave now. Spread the word.

relation_updates: Malbin questions evacuation feasibility
status_updates: camp status changed from settled to evacuating

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 162 A RISE REVEALS THE IMMENSITY OF THE KRASNAYA GORKA SWAMP 162
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: One by one, men remove their belts and offer them to Asael, creating a quiet, heroic moment that moves Tuvia deeply as the group unites for the crossing.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Leader who, inspired by Asael, reasserts command to organize the group for crossing.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Tuvia, moved by Asael's return and courage, regains his voice and orders the group to support the human chain plan with their belts.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Cross the swamp using a human chain of belts.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: The group begins offering belts, and Tuvia fights back emotion while maintaining leadership.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The actual crossing of the swamp.
evidence_quotes: Tuvia is deeply moved. His little brother has become a man. Once more, he finds his voice.
TUVIA Each person takes care of the other. (meeting Asael's eye) .Give him your belt.
Tuvia looks at the group, looks away, fighting back emotion.

relation_updates: Asael: Tuvia recognizes his brother's maturity and they exchange grateful nod of mutual support.
status_updates: Leadership restored as Tuvia actively commands group and regains emotional control.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 174 BOTH GROUPS MEET - THE DESTROYED TANK SMOLDERS NEARBY 174
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia and Zus reunite after battle, exchange brief words, and embrace as Zus joins Tuvia's group to help build a new camp following their separation.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Leader directing post-battle retreat and reuniting with his brother.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Tuvia reunites with Zus; Zus decides to join Tuvia's group, and they embrace.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Tuvia and Zus are united, planning to build a new camp.
evidence_quotes: TUVIA Only weapons and ammunition! Spread the word.
TUVIA Everybody gather your things! We have to get out of the open!
ZUS Perhaps you have room for one more?
Tuvia reaches out his arms and they embrace fiercely.

relation_updates: Zus joins Tuvia's group
Tuvia and Zus reconcile with a fierce embrace
status_updates: Tuvia's group is now united with Zus's remaining unit
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Authoritative leader prioritizing weapons and group safety.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Tuvia leaves his wife to protect his family, reunites with his brothers after their parents' murder, and becomes the leader of a growing group of Jewish survivors. He expands his mission from protecting his family to rescuing entire communities, establishing a forest sanctuary, and clashing with his brother Zus over strategy and leadership. After facing moral dilemmas, personal losses, and a devastating German attack, Tuvia evacuates his camp, endures a harrowing swamp crossing, and ultimately reunites with Zus to fight and survive, later being recognized as a humble hero.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Two brothers, Zus and Asael, confront a farmer for food but are threatened and forced to retreat, with Zus warning they will return.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Older brother attempting to forage food from a hostile farmer
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Zus confronts the farmer, takes a menacing step but is held back by Asael, and threatens to return.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Obtain food from the farmer
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Retreated to the woods without food, with Zus warning they will return
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The farmer knows they are fugitives and may alert others
evidence_quotes: Zus and Asael move warily through a barnyard.
ZUS, the older of the two brothers, takes a menacing step toward the farmer
but his younger brother holds him back.
ZUS We'll be back.

relation_updates: Asael physically restrains Zus from violence
Zus defers to Asael's caution
status_updates: Marked as wanted fugitives by local farmer
Established as confrontational survivors
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Zus shows aggression but defers to Asael's restraint

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 12 ASAEL AND ARON SLEEP HUDDLED ON THE GROUND 12
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia returns, greeted with fear and relief; Asael clings to him after his parents' death, while Zus cautiously welcomes him with a mezuzah.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Cautious brother greeting Tuvia with a family heirloom
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Appears armed with a hatchet, exchanges wary looks with Tuvia, and tosses him the family mezuzah while welcoming him home
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Tuvia holds the mezuzah; brothers are reunited but with visible wariness
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Wary interaction indicates tension between Zus and Tuvia
evidence_quotes: Zus appears, hatchet in hand.
Tuvia and Zus look at each other warily.
Zus takes the mezuzah from his pocket, tosses it to Tuvia.
ZUS (CONT'D) Welcome home.

relation_updates: Reunites with Tuvia
Transfers family symbol to older brother
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Possesses the family mezuzah, a Jewish religious object

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia questions raiding for food; Zus insists on taking it despite risks. Asael asserts their knowledge of the woods. Tuvia, outvoted, concedes as the group prepares to act.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Advocate for raiding Wilencki for food
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Zus insists on taking food from Wilencki by force, overriding Tuvia's caution, and the group decides to act on his plan after Tuvia is outvoted.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Take food from Wilencki's farm
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Tuvia concedes; group prepares to raid Wilencki.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether the raid will succeed without being caught by police or dogs.
evidence_quotes: ZUS No. We take it.
ZUS Fuck the dogs.
Tuvia glares at Zus, who glares back.
ZUS I have run from the police my whole life. Do you really think it's a good time to stop?

relation_updates: Adversarial dynamic with Tuvia
Cooperative alignment with Asael
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Pushes for direct action over caution in survival situations.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Zus threatens WALENCKI, kicks him aside, finds a rifle above the stove, takes it, and warns him they were never there.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Assaults and robs farmer Walencki
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Physically attacks Walencki, forces him to reveal a rifle, takes it, and warns him to keep silent.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Obtain food and a firearm
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Armed with a rifle and food supplies are being taken
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Walencki will report the robbery despite the threat
evidence_quotes: Zus grabs a dinner plate and SMASHES IT IN THE FARMER'S FACE.
ZUS WHERE IS YOUR GUN?
Above the stove is an old rifle. Zus grabs it, points it at the farmer.
ZUS We were never here.

relation_updates: Hostile relationship with Walencki
status_updates: Acquires a rifle (now armed)
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Violent individual who uses intimidation to acquire weapons

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Two starving men arrive, revealing Horodyszcze's massacre; Zus learns his family is dead, mourns violently; group grieves together, grappling with loss and survival.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Grieving husband and brother
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Introduces Rona as forest wife, learns wife and child were killed in Horodyszcze massacre, reacts with violent grief and expresses guilt.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Grieving, has walked away from Tuvia, with Rona as partner.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Guilt over not protecting his family.
evidence_quotes: ZUS Tuvia, this is Rona. Rona is my forest wife.
JACOV Two days ago there were three thousand Jews in Horodyszcze. Now there are fifty.
Zus leans his head against a tree. After a moment he begins to BEAT HIS HEAD against it until BLOOD pours down his face.
ZUS I thought they'd be safe. I should have been with them.

relation_updates: Introduces Rona as forest wife
Grieves with Tuvia, strengthening bond
status_updates: Family confirmed dead
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Man dealing with loss and guilt.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 42 MOMENTS LATER - JUST OUTSIDE OF CAMP -- 42
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Zus and Tuvia clash over leadership and morality as they debate whether to execute captives; Zus insists on action, Tuvia resists, emphasizing humanity, but agrees to wait for dark.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Defiant brother challenging Tuvia's authority over executing captives
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Zus argues for executing captives, recruits Peretz, Jacov, and Asael to form a faction, and confronts Tuvia in a stand-off
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To carry out the revenge mission with his recruited allies, with or without Tuvia's approval
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: After confrontation, agrees to wait for nightfall but remains in conflict with Tuvia
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Power struggle between brothers over leadership and methods
evidence_quotes: Zus is loading Wilencki's gun.
ZUS Blood for blood. You had your revenge.
ZUS Peretz and Jacov. (POINTEDLY) Asael, too.
TUVIA (to Zus) You are making the decisions now?

relation_updates: Relationship with Tuvia becomes more adversarial
Recruits Asael to his side
status_updates: Asserting his own command
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Leader who recruits allies to act against Tuvia's wishes

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Zus saves Tuvia by shooting an officer aiming at him, after breaking a sergeant's nose and seizing his weapon, killing both the officer and a woman in the car.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Protector and fighter
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Breaks a sergeant's nose with a knife handle, seizes his Schmeisser machine gun, and uses it to kill an officer and a woman firing at Tuvia, saving his brother's life.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Eliminate threat to Tuvia
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Armed with Schmeisser machine gun, having killed the officer and woman in the car.
evidence_quotes: ZUS USES THE HANDLE OF THE KNIFE to BREAK the Sergeant's nose.
He RIPS the SCHMEISSER away
firing point- blank into the man, whose greatcoat CATCHES FIRE.
ZUS TURNS THE MACHINE GUN on the car BLOWING OUT THE WINDOWS, killing the Officer and the woman -- and saving his brother's life.

relation_updates: Saves brother Tuvia's life
status_updates: Acquires Schmeisser machine gun
Kills officer and woman in car
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Effective combat protector

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia asserts leadership, emphasizing survival, unity, and humanity over revenge, as the group commits to ethical resistance and mutual support amid hardship.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Subordinate brother who accepts Tuvia's leadership
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lowers his head after Tuvia's speech, showing acceptance of Tuvia's authority.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Tuvia is acknowledged as the undisputed leader by the group, including Zus.
evidence_quotes: At this he looks directly at Zus. Daring him to object.
Everyone nods in mute acknowledgement. Zus lowers his head.

relation_updates: Submits to Tuvia's leadership by lowering head
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Pragmatist who yields to stronger leadership when challenged.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Tuvia and Zus's violent clash escalates, leading Zus to leave with others to join real partisans, deepening the rift between the brothers and leaving Asael torn between them.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Brother challenging Tuvia's leadership over rescue policy
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Zus physically fights Tuvia after arguing against rescuing ghetto survivors, then leaves with fighters to join other partisans.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Join real partisans separate from Tuvia's command
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Departed Tuvia's group with loyal fighters, heading to join other partisans
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Disagreement on risking the group to save ghetto Jews
evidence_quotes: ZUS And when the Germans follow these hundreds and slaughter us.
Zus gains the upper hand and starts to beat the crap out of Tuvia.
He stops by Bella's side, touches her arm, then disappears down the trail.

relation_updates: Complete rupture with Tuvia over rescue policy
Departure with loyal fighters
status_updates: Leaves Tuvia's otriad permanently
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Prioritizes fighter survival over civilian rescue

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 104F INTERCUT: THE GROWING ECSTASY OF THE WEDDING CELEBRATION 104F
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Zus captures a truck by detonating a grenade, leading to German surrender; partisans celebrate and loot supplies while Zus executes captured Germans; Viktor confirms Zus's Bielski relation, acknowledging him.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Combat leader who aggressively exhortes fighters and leads assaults
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Leads grenade assault on truck, executes surrendered German prisoners, and is acknowledged by Viktor as a Bielski.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Acknowledged by Viktor as a Bielski and accepted into the partisan group.
evidence_quotes: ZUS RUNS AMONG THEM, fiercely EXHORTING them to attack. ZUS Get up! Move! SHOOT OR I'LL SHOOT YOU...
ZUS PULLS A POTATO MASHER GRENADE from his belt and RUNS AT THE TRUCK in a mad headlong assault.

relation_updates: Viktor acknowledges Zus as Bielski
Establishes authority over Jewish fighters
status_updates: Proven effective in combat
Accepted by Russian partisans
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Aggressive fighter who executes prisoners without hesitation.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Zus gives Tuvia a blood-soaked medicine package, rejecting his plea to return despite their brotherly bond, and expresses disillusionment with ideologies.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Brother delivering medicine and expressing disillusionment
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Zus gives Tuvia a blood-soaked medicine package, accuses him of valuing civilians over fighters, and dismisses political labels when Tuvia questions him.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Zus separates from Tuvia after the exchange, showing no sign of returning.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Zus will rejoin Tuvia's group
evidence_quotes: From his coat Zus takes out a BLOOD-SOAKED PACKAGE.
ZUS Fighters die so that malbushim may live, that's what you believe, yes?
ZUS Communist, Zionist, Manicurist, what difference does it make? You got your medicine.
Zus lays his head back on the seat, closes his eyes.

relation_updates: Strained relationship with Tuvia; reaffirms kinship but with bitterness
status_updates: Possesses blood-soaked medicine package
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Cynical survivor who rejects ideological causes

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 173 TUVIA IS NOW ISOLATED AND PINNED DOWN 173
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Zus and Jewish fighters launch a surprise attack, creating crossfire; Zus destroys a tank with a grenade, survives explosion, and reunites eyes with Tuvia.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Surprise attacker breaking German siege to save Tuvia
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Zus charges under fire, guns down a tank commander, destroys the tank with a grenade, and survives the explosion to see Tuvia.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Protect Tuvia from the tank assault by neutralizing the threat.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Alive after tank destruction, making eye contact with Tuvia.
evidence_quotes: Without regard for his own life, Zus charges.
Zus guns down the tank commander manning the machine gun from the open hatch.
Jumps onto the tank and DROPS A GRENADE inside.
Zus stands up amid the billowing smoke. He sees Tuvia who is staring back at him.

relation_updates: Reunites with Tuvia through battlefield eye contact
status_updates: Proves combat effectiveness by destroying tank
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Combat-effective fighter who protects his brother in battle.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Zus Bielski evolves from a protective older brother into a pragmatic, aggressive fighter and leader. His journey is defined by escalating conflict with brother Tuvia over survival methods, culminating in a split and eventual reconciliation. Through combat, loss, and shifting alliances, Zus becomes a skilled partisan while maintaining his core identity as a fierce protector of his family and people.
